assertions.description: The Protoboard is a Flipper Zero backpack protoboard with a 2.54mm grid of plated through-holes. The analyzer correctly reports 337 THT and 18 SMD footprints (the SMD ones are the connector pads). The 358 total footprint count vs 355 (337+18) discrepancy of 3 is unexplained but minor. Board dimensions (66.42x48.1mm), 0 vias, 0 zones, and routing_complete=true are all consistent with a manual proto-pad board with only edge connector routing.
